a_image.alt: Acid Graphics style mood board — Aesthetic · Rave & Distortion

sections.a_eyebrow: Vibrant · Neon · Bold Colors · Abstract · Experimental
sections.a_description: Acid-bright neons, chrome warps, and the eye-melting visual intensity of 90s rave culture brought to screen — Acid Graphics design turns the volume to maximum on every visual dial. The acid green and hot magenta accents against pure black backgrounds create the digital equivalent of a warehouse party at 4am, where every surface reflects strobing lights and bass vibrations.

This hyper-vivid style powers electronic music event pages, rave culture archives, streetwear brand launches, and experimental art platforms. You'll see it on DJ portfolio sites, underground club promotion pages, psychedelic art galleries, and festival lineups — anywhere that the visual language needs to channel the raw energy of warehouse raves and the unapologetic sensory overload of acid house culture.

a_image_cover.alt: Acid Graphics style use case illustration
Acid Graphics style use case illustration
Acid Graphics style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The hyper-vivid, rave-culture aesthetic of acid graphics — chrome warps, eye-melting neon, and the trippy visual language of 90s rave flyers and acid house culture. Background: black (#000000). The .inner panel has a dark background (#0a0a0a) with a 2px border featuring a vivid gradient (linear-gradient #39ff14 to #ff00ff) effect — acid-bright edges on dark surfaces. Colors: acid green (#39ff14) as the primary accent — the unmistakable neon green of rave culture. Hot magenta (#ff00ff) as secondary. Bright white (#ffffff) for headings, muted green (#70cc60) for body text. The aesthetic is intentionally overwhelming — maximum saturation, maximum contrast, the visual equivalent of strobing warehouse lights. Set in Space Grotesk — geometric and slightly futuristic, with the mechanical quality that suits rave and acid culture. Heading at weight 700, 26px, line-height 1.2, text-transform uppercase, color #ffffff. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 3px letter-spacing, color #39ff14. Body at weight 400, 14px, line-height 1.6, color #70cc60. Buttons: primary — acid green (#39ff14), black text, 0 border-radius. Secondary: transparent, magenta border (#ff00ff). Alternatives: Orbitron (futuristic display), Chakra Petch (techno geometric).
